---
name: Skill correction
about: Report wrong, outdated, or misleading skill content or tool semantics
title: "[Correction] "
labels: skill-correction
---

## Which skill or reference

<!-- e.g. label-purchase, tracking, shippo/references/carrier-guide.md -->

## What is wrong

<!-- Quote or describe the incorrect / outdated content. A direct quote of the offending text helps. -->

## What it should say

<!-- The correct behavior, value, operation name, parameter, or workflow. -->

## Type of correction

- [ ] Outdated content (was correct, the API/product changed)
- [ ] Wrong tool semantics (operation name, parameters, return shape, constraints)
- [ ] Wrong workflow guidance (sequencing, routing, UX gate, mode discipline)
- [ ] Misleading or ambiguous wording
- [ ] Other

## Evidence

<!-- Link to Shippo API docs, an actual API/MCP response, or steps that demonstrate the discrepancy. -->

## Where the fix belongs (if known)

<!--
Per CONTRIBUTING.md: workflow narrative lives in the canonical skills/ here. Per-tool
MCP semantics (tool names, parameters, return shapes) are maintained separately and
documented at docs.goshippo.com. If this is a per-tool description issue rather than
workflow content, it may belong there instead.
-->
